title: pkcs11: label containing '/' silently truncated in split_path
description: Trigger: PKCS#11 label containing a forward slash, e.g. secretx://pkcs11/0/some/nested/label. split_path finds only the first '/', returns slot=0, label=some, and silently drops /nested/label. Fix: use path.splitn(2, '/') to take exactly the first slash and keep the rest of the label intact. Should return InvalidUri rather than silently truncating.
